data.name: Agriculture, Feed and Animal Care
data.hero_background_description: Agriculture, Feed and Animal Care focuses on sustainable farming practices, efficient crop production, and the overall health and nutrition of livestock. It includes modern agricultural techniques, soil and water management, pest control.
data.feature_description: In collaboration with customers and universities, we’ve developed technologies to help farmers improve the efficiency and sustainability of their agricultural operations. For animal feed manufacturers, we supply a range of technologies, backed by technical and regulatory support, to help preserve grains and increase feed mill efficiency.
data.feature_sub_title: We’re accelerating a low-carbon future with the Carbon Footprint Ledger
data.feature_sub_description:
Agriculture, Feed and Animal Care focuses on sustainable farming practices, efficient crop production, and the overall health and nutrition of livestock. It includes modern agricultural techniques, soil and water management, pest control, and the use of quality fertilizers to improve yield.

This domain also covers animal husbandry, including proper feeding systems, balanced nutrition, breeding practices, and veterinary care to ensure the well-being and productivity of animals such as cattle, poultry, and fish.

sub_industry.name: Agricultural Films for Sustainable Crop Production
sub_industry.description: Our agricultural film products have been designed in collaboration with leading academics and agricultural institutes to advance the technology and techniques used in farming.

resources.title: Agriculture, Feed & Animal Care Resources
resources.description: Explore essential resources on modern agriculture, livestock management, and animal nutrition. Learn about sustainable farming.

resources.title: Agriculture, Feed & Animal Care Resources
resources.description: Explore essential resources on modern agriculture, livestock management, and animal nutrition. Learn about sustainable farming.

faqs.question: 1. What is included in agriculture and animal care resources?
faqs.answer: These resources include information on crop production, soil management, livestock care, animal nutrition, feed quality, and modern farming techniques.

faqs.question: 2. Why is animal nutrition important in farming?
faqs.answer: Proper nutrition ensures healthy livestock, better productivity (milk, meat, eggs), and reduces disease risks, leading to higher farm efficiency.

faqs.question: 3. What are sustainable agriculture practices?
faqs.answer: Sustainable practices include organic farming, efficient water usage, soil conservation, and eco-friendly pest control methods to protect the environment.

products.name: DOWANOL™ PPh Glycol Ether
products.description: DOWANOL™ PPh Glycol Ether is a slow-evaporating, very hydrophobic glycol ether ideal in coalescing and carrier solvent applications. DOWANOL™ PPh Glycol Ether is a slow evaporating, very hydrophobic glycol ether.
